titleStmt.title: SII 5.1409: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1409. (A.R. No. 46 of 1897). ON THE SOUTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—. svasti śrī ..
tirumakaḷ pola peruni
lac celviyum taṉakke U
rimaipūṇṭamai maṉakko
ḷak kāntaḷurcālai kalama
ṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭum
kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum
taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭum ko
llamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai nika
ḻa Īḻamaṇṭalamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi
taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ū
ḻiyuḷ ḷellā vāṇṭun toḻutaka vi
ḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarai tecuko
ḷ śrīkovirājarāja rāja kesari panma kki
yāṇṭu 10 7 Āvatu nittaviṉotavaḷa
nāṭṭu nallūrnāṭṭu brahmade yam śrīrā
jakesaricaturvve timaṅkalattu ma hāsahai yom viṟṟa
nilavilaiyāvaṇam nammaiyuṭaiya cakravartti brāhma ṇaūr
kaḷil brāhma ṇarkku kiḻppaṭṭa jātikaḷil kāṇikaḷil paṇi
ceymakkaḷ paṇiceykāṇi yoḻiya niṉṟār kāṇi viṟkave
ṉṟaruḷicceyya pukka keḻvippaṭi Atikārikaḷ vāṉavaṉmuve
ntaveḷār Aṭaivu kuttuvittu varicai viṭṭapaṭi viṟṟuk kācu ta
ṇṭukaveṉṟaruḷicceytu Uṭaiyār paṇimakaṉ cāttampiyārai
eva Iccāttampiyār taṇṭa mahāsahai yom viṟṟa nilavilaiyā
vaṇam nammaiyuṭaiya cakravartti śrīparāntakatevar tirumakaḷār śrīku
ntavaippirāṭṭiyār Innittaviṉotavaḷanāṭṭu tañcāvūrkūṟṟat
tu tañcāvūr puṟampaṭi vaṭavāṟṟiṉ vaṭakarai karuntiṭṭaikuṭit tevarkku tiruno
ntā viḷakku vaiyppataṟkkāka Iśrīparāntakatevar tirumakaḷār śrīkuntavaip
pirāṭṭiyārkku mahāsabhai yom viṟṟukkuṭutta nila(m)māvatu Ivvirā
jakesa riccatu rvve
timaṅkalattu naratoṅkava
tikku meṟku Eḻāṅ kaṇṇā
ṟṟu Irāja kesa rivāykkālu
kku teṟku 3- Ām catirattu vaṭa
kkuṭaiya nilam mūṉṟu māvum naratoṅ
kavatikku meṟku 4- Āṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Irāja
kesari vāykkālukku teṟku 2- Āñ ca
tirattu teṟkaṭainta kha kālile
teṟkaṭainta �4 Orumāva
raiyum Āka �4 nāṉmāvarai
ceyyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam
ceytukuṭuttom śrīparāntakate
var tirumakaḷār śrīkuntavaippi
rāṭṭiyārkku śrīrā jakesa riccatu
rvve timaṅkalattu mahāsabhai
yom Innilaṉ nāṉmāvarai
ceyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu
kuṭuttuk koṇṭa vilaipporuṭ kācu Īḻakkā
cu vācipaṭāmaic celluṅ kācu Emmi(l) licai
nta vilaipporuṭkācu 8 10 1� Iv
veṇpattoṉṟaraiyey muṉṟumā varaikkāṇik
ku kiḻpaṭṭa jātikaḷilār kāṇivilaik kācukke celavāka
ṭuppittu Innilattukku Itu vey vilaiyāvaṇamum Ituve
y porumāvaṟutip poruṭcila volaiyum Ituvey Āvatākavum Itu
vallatu veṟu poruṭmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavārallā
tārāka Ipparicu Oṭṭi vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poru(ḷ)ḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ce
ytukuṭuttoma nammaiyuṭaiya cakravartti śrīparāntakatevar tirumakaḷār śrīkunta
vaippirāṭṭiyārkku śrīrājakesari caturvve timaṅkalattu mahāsabhai yom paṇiyā
l Ivvūr madhyasta ṉ tiruveṅkaṭavaṉ Āyarkoḻuntiṉeṉ Ivai yeṉ ṉeḻuttu I
ppaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivvūr vaikāṉasaṉ kāśya paṉ śrīvāsu tevaṉ Ārāvamuti ṉeṉ Ippaṭi
paṇiyāl madhyasta ṉ veṅkaṭavaṉ Araṅka(ṉ)ṉeṉ Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭi paṇiyāl Iv
vūr madhyasta ṉ villiṟ kiṭantā(ṉ)ṉāṉa maṅkalāccaṉeṉ Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟive
nvaikhā nasasū ttirattu kautamaṉ kovintaṉa ciṅkappirāṉeṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭi paṇi
yāl madhya] sta ṉ Araṅkam pūtiyāṉa maṅkalottamaṉeṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi paṇiyāl
Ivvūr veṭkovaṉ puṟampiyaṉ ṉeccil maṇṭaiyeṉ ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi paṇiyāl
madhyasta ṉ Araṅkam Ulakaṉāṉa cātuppiriyaṉeṉ Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭi paṇi
yāl Ivvūr veṭkovaṉ poyyilitevaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi paṇiyāl Ivvūr veṭko
vaṉ nakkaṉ muttaraiyaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ippatiṉṉeḻāvate Ivvolai meṟpaṭṭa nilam nāṉ
māvaraiyum Ittañcāvūr puṟampaṭi vaṭavāṟṟiṉ vaṭakarai Ikkaruntiṭṭaikuṭi tevarkku cantrā
tittavaṟ nontāviḷakku naṉkerippataṟku Ittevarkke yurittāka kuṭutteṉ parāntaka
ṉ kuntavaiyeṉ Ippiṭipā ṭaruḷicceyya Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivarkku Atikārañceykiṉ
ṟa ciṟupeṟuṭaiyāṉ ko raṉ teṉṉavaṉ Eriyūrnāṭṭuveḷāṉeṉ Ivai En
neḻuttu Ipparicu Aṟiveṉ Ippirāṭṭiyārkku Atikārañceykiṉṟa nākamaṅkiḻā
ṉ Aṅkāṭi cūṟṟiyyeṉ Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭi kuṭuttamai Aṟiveṉ Ippirāṭṭi
yār kaṇakku pūvaṇūru
ṭaiyāṉ varakuṇaṉ ciṅ
ka paṭi kuṭut
veṉ Āḻ
ṉ Eṉpā
Ivai E
n neḻuttu Ippaṭi kuṭu
ttamai Aṟiveṉ Āḻ
vār karaṇattāṉ marutaṅku
ṭaiyāṉ māyilaṭṭi Ācca
ṉeṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 5.1409 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
